stories.title: Three teams ahead of Knicks in 2027 title odds
stories.summary: Three teams -- the Spurs, Thunder and Celtics -- have better odds to win the 2027 NBA championship than the Knicks at sportsbooks around the nation.

stories.title: Liberty clinch spot in Commissioner's Cup final
stories.summary: The Liberty beat the Mystics 86-64 on Sunday and clinched a spot in the Commissioner's Cup championship game.

stories.title: Hamilton: 'Never gave up hope' on Ferrari dream
stories.summary: Lewis Hamilton has said he "never gave up hope" of achieving a victory with Ferrari after securing his first win with the Italian team at the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix on Sunday.

stories.title: Havertz double leads Germany in WC opening rout
stories.summary: Kai Havertz scored two goals as Germany pulled away from World Cup first-timer Curaçao late in the opening half and piled on after that in a 7-1 win Sunday in a group match.

stories.title: Hamlin wins again, passes Busch on all-time list
stories.summary: Denny Hamlin won the NASCAR Cup Series race at Pocono Raceway for his third consecutive victory and passed the late Kyle Busch for ninth on the all-time wins list.
